- (43, 19): W
- (43, 22): g
- (43, 25): N (goal)

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Path: UP, LEFT, LEFT, UP, LEFT, LEFT, DOWN, DOWN, RIGHT
# From (43,43) to (43,25)

actions = ['UP', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'UP', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'DOWN', 'DOWN', 'RIGHT']

for a in actions:
    action([a])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    # Find player
    player_pos = None
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b':
            cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
            cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
            player_pos = (cr, cc)
            break
    go = last_action_result.get('game_over', False)
    done = last_action_result.get('done', False)
    lc = last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)
    print(f"{a}: player={player_pos}, go={go}, done={done}, lc={lc}")
    if go or done or lc:
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

    go = last_action_result.get('game_over', False)
    done = last_action_result.get('done', False)
    lc = last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)
    print(f"{a}: player={player_pos}, go={go}, done={done}, lc={lc}")
    if go or done or lc:
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
